idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release: JSON to Dart entity class generation
  • Support for json_serializable annotations
  • Configurable nullable, defaultValue, and JsonKey.name options
  • JSON tree view
idea-plugin.name: Flutter Hi Json
idea-plugin.description:
Flutter Hi Json

Convert JSON data into Dart entity classes with json_serializable annotations.

Features

  • Generate Dart entity classes from JSON with a right-click
  • Real-time preview of generated code
  • JSON tree view for structure inspection
  • Configurable options: nullable, defaultValue, JsonKey.name
  • JSON validation with English error messages
  • Auto-run build_runner after generation

Usage

  1. Right-click on a directory in the project view
  2. Select New → Flutter Hi Json
  3. Paste your JSON and configure options
  4. Click OK to generate the Dart file

action.description: Generate Dart entity class from JSON
